name: Buckeye Greens
about: Buckeye Greens is a Cincinnati-based company specializing in the design and installation of custom putting greens and synthetic lawns for residential properties. They serve the Greater Cincinnati, Columbus, and Dayton areas, transforming backyards into personal golf retreats with professional-grade surfaces. The company offers a range of services including outdoor and indoor putting greens, short game areas, backyard golf courses, and various synthetic turf solutions for lawns, playgrounds, and pet areas.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom-designed putting greens that mimic professional course feel
Year-round practice accessibility without golf course fees
Professional installation and design for an authentic golfing experience at home

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, clients typically use their own golf equipment when practicing on the custom putting greens installed by Buckeye Greens.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The service focuses on installing greens at private residences, so food and drink policies would be determined by the homeowner for personal use.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As an installation company, Buckeye Greens doesn't operate a public facility where 18 holes can be played. Their service provides the equipment for personal practice at home.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Buckeye Greens offers synthetic grass solutions for playgrounds, indicating a kid-friendly approach to their services. Their putting greens can also be family-friendly spaces for outdoor activities.
